<!-- Thanks for contributing to SkillSpell! Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes at the repo root
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] Updated docs / `.env.example` if configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets, internal hostnames, or private infrastructure details included
